---
id: post-auth
title: "Test a login and password for validity"
description: "Test a login and password for validity. Only available to super user keys. We strongly recommend the login and password parameters are passed into the request body rather than the query string."
sidebar_label: "Test a login and password for validity"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"
info_path: api/xenforo-api
custom_edit_url: null
hide_send_button: true
---

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Test a login and password for validity"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/auth/"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Test a login and password for validity. Only available to super user keys. We strongly recommend the login and password parameters are passed into the request body rather than the query string.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
